title: Blond Cheat
writer: Aladár László, Charles Kaufman, Paul Yawitz
actors: Joan Fontaine, Derrick De Marney, Cecil Kellaway
plot: Socially prominent Michael Ashburn, is the chief assistant to Rufus Trent, wealthy London loan broker. He has allowed himself to become engaged to the Rufus' daughter, Roberta, the match engineered primarily by socially-ambitious ...
